runners.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 1.2 lengths third at Addington but did record a powerful 17.03 over the 295m journey. More than capable and has to be included.

runners.formComment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by 3 lengths in 22.48, beating Claws In Krypton. Last start finished 4th in a Class 3/4 on March 31 over 390m at this track behind Mitcham Julian beaten 5 lengths (23.20). Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

runners.formComment: In the money last time at Addington (17.27) in a Class 4, finishing a 8 length second. Has two wins and three placings from eight starts from the draw. With even luck and a clean start he should be prominent at the business end.

runners.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 390m in 22.63 last start, beating Tuahiwi. Top chance.

runners.formComment: Working her way into winning form after her success on February 4 at this track over 390m. Last start was second over 295m in 17.12, behind Georgie Pie. Around the mark recently. Definite contender.

runners.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last four starts. Last time out finished 3rd on April 8 over 390m at this track behind Skeletor beaten 2 lengths (22.51) in a Class 3/4. Consistent dog who is always a combination must.

runners.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. Most recent effort finished 6th over 295m at Addington beaten 9 lengths (17.48) behind Opawa Elvis in a Class 4 on April 9. Suited here and expected to run well.

runners.formComment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by 1.5 lengths in 22.84, beating Mitcham Julian. Last start finished last over 295m at Addington beaten 15 lengths (17.78) behind Opawa Weatherley in a Class 4 on April 9. Not keen, needs to lift.
